title: JSON Path Query
description: Extract values from JSON with a dot/bracket path: .key, [0], [-1], * wildcard, [1:3] slices and nested flattening — all matches shown live. Fully local.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Parsing and querying run in your browser — nothing is uploaded. Syntax: .key / ['key'] / [0] / [-1] / * wildcard / [1:3] slice, freely nested. Multiple matches return as an array.
